title: Profiling of the TNBC Tumor Microenvironment's Functional Heterogeneity by CITE-seq to Guide Personalized Medicine.
snippet: Introduction / Objective: Triple-negative breast cancer (TNBC) is an aggressive subtype with few effective treatments and frequent resistance to immune checkpoint inhibitors. The heterogeneous and plastic tumor microenvironment (TME) is a dynamic, complex ecosystem. This study aims to deconstruct the TNBC immune ecosystem and generate a cellular atlas of it...
